reviews.comment:
Los baños muy descuidados. Son públicos  para toda la ciudad no solo para los que vamos  cargando combustibles.me dio asco entrar. Y en la cafetería  se negaron hacernos tres café  porqué  en 10 minutos cerraba la caja. Una vergüenza  estaba frío  y llovía.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms are very neglected. They're public for the entire city, not just for those of us who are filling up with gas. I was disgusted to go in. And at the cafeteria, they refused to make us three cups of coffee because the register would close in 10 minutes. It was a disgrace, it was cold and raining.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZcWNmQXBBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los playeros le ponen ganas, pero...Si tenés las alfombras del coche limpias...NO TE BAJES!!! Podés llegar a subir medio litro de aceite o diesel del piso, y, al igual que TODAS las estaciones ACA, ni se te ocurra ir al baño!!!

(Translated by Google)
The attendants are trying hard, but... If your car mats are clean... DON'T GET OUT!!! You could end up spilling half a liter of oil or diesel off the floor, and, just like at ALL the stations HERE, don't even think about going to the bathroom!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZcDhuNHJnRRAB
